---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem Statement

What user problem or workflow gap are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the idea as clearly as possible.

## Why It Matters

Explain the expected impact on the hydration workflow, usability, or maintainability.

## Scope

- What should be included?
- What should not be included?

## Notes

- Screenshots, references, or design ideas
- Any trade-offs or constraints to consider
